original_snippet_context: Report from Havre and Sao Paulo on market conditions, specifically coffee prices and exchange rates.
relevant_quote: Na abertura do mercado os bancos inglezes, á excepção do River Plate e o Banco Italiano dei Brasile olharam hontem, a tabeliã de 16 5|16, que os primeiros modificaram logo para 15 3|8, já em vigor nos demais bancos.
justification: This excerpt describes the opening market rates for exchange, mentioning specific banks and their offered rates. It doesn't express an opinion on the Caixa de Conversão or any related policy.
